reason: All 8 QA tasks for the UI Style Redesign completed successfully. 1005/1005 frontend tests passing across 34 test files. Design token fidelity validated and fixed (12 files). Dark mode binary inversion verified across all 11 pages. Responsive breakpoints tested and fixed (10 fixes across 4 components). WCAG AA accessibility compliance achieved (~25 issues fixed across 15 files). All CRUD functional regression tests pass. Animation consistency verified (3 fixes applied). The Code Quality Review flagged a filter injection in RecordsBrowserPage.tsx:568, but git diff confirms this is pre-existing code not introduced or modified by the UI redesign — it should be tracked as a separate security backlog item. Other findings (code duplication, performance, weak tests) are pre-existing technical debt outside the scope of this visual redesign. The project meets all acceptance criteria for the UI Style Redesign: pages match the Stitch design references, design tokens are correctly applied, dark mode works, responsive layouts adapt properly, accessibility standards are met, and no functional regressions were introduced.
